General.Name: Yunfeng Financial Group Ltd
General.Description: Yunfeng Financial Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides insurance products in Hong Kong and Macao. The company operates in two segments, Insurance Business; and Other Financial Services and Corporate. It provides life and medical insurance, annuities, pension, and mandatory provident fund schemes. The company also offers fund and asset management services, as well as financing and investing solutions. In addition, the company engages in the securities brokerage, custodian and other, financial technology, and principal investment businesses. Further, it provides administrative, trustee, and general services; agency and consultancy services; marketing and promoting products, and public relations services; and computer software and hardware technological development, technical consulting, technology, and database and computer network services. The company was formerly known as Reorient Group Limited and changed its name to Yunfeng Financial Group Limited in November 2016. Yunfeng Financial Group Limited was incorporated in 1982 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: YF Life Centre, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
